'''Grupp''' was a fat male [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Police officer/Legends|member]] of the [[Hweg Shul]] Municipal [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|Police]]. He and his partner [[Snaplaunce]] saved [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] from near death at the hands of [[Taselda]]'s followers.

{{Char-stub}}
